fetched_via: git clone + uv sync + uv run scripts/generate.py

transactions.parquet.schema_note: AMLGentex emits transaction-network parquet with sender/receiver accounts, amounts, timestamps, and SAR pattern labels. Schema is configurable via data.yaml; see AMLGentex docs.

pipeline.elixir_consumer: mix corpus.generate.amlgentex (reads amlgentex.ndjson; produces sharded AH/CP/PA/Txn ndjson under --out)

config_pin: corpus/upstream/amlgentex/config/data.yaml — committed alongside this manifest so the simulator output is reproducible across reseeds. Override the AMLGENTEX_REF for a different repo commit.
notes: AMLGentex is a generator, not a static dataset — there is no upstream artefact to sha-pin. Determinism comes from (repo ref + data.yaml + simulator seed). Parquet stays outside the repo; only the NDJSON subset enters the Elixir-side mix task. No new Elixir deps (no parquet reader) — Python emits the NDJSON sidecar.
